Flowchart.syntax:
Direction: TD (top-down), LR (left-right), BT, RL.
Nodes: A[rectangle] A(rounded) A{diamond} A([stadium]) A[[subroutine]] A[(cylinder)] A((circle)) A>asymmetric] A{{hexagon}}
Links: --> (arrow) --- (line) -.-> (dotted arrow) ==> (thick arrow)
Labels on links: A -->|text| B or A -- text --> B
Subgraphs: subgraph title ... end
IMPORTANT: If node text contains special chars like () {} |, wrap in quotes: A["Text (with parens)"]

Sequence.syntax:
Start with: sequenceDiagram
Participants: participant Alice or actor Bob
Messages: A->>B: text (solid arrow) A-->>B: text (dotted) A-)B: text (async) A-xB: text (cross)
Activation: activate A / deactivate A or A->>+B: / A-->>-B:
Notes: Note right of A: text / Note over A,B: text
Loops: loop text ... end
Alternatives: alt text ... else text ... end
Optional: opt text ... end
Parallel: par text ... and text ... end
Critical: critical text ... option text ... end
Break: break text ... end
Rect highlight: rect rgba(r,g,b,a) ... end

Class.syntax:
Start with: classDiagram
Class definition: class ClassName { +String attr\n +method() }
Visibility: + public, - private, # protected, ~ package
Relationships: A <|-- B (inheritance) A *-- B (composition) A o-- B (aggregation) A --> B (association) A -- B (link) A ..> B (dependency) A ..|> B (realization)
Cardinality: A "1" --> "*" B
Annotation: <<interface>> <<abstract>> <<service>> <<enumeration>>
Generic: class List~T~
Direction: direction RL

State.syntax:
Start with: stateDiagram-v2
States: s1 (simple) state "Description" as s1
Transitions: s1 --> s2 or s1 --> s2 : label
Start/End: [*] --> s1 or s1 --> [*]
Composite: state StateName { s1 --> s2 }
Fork/Join: state fork_state <<fork>> / <<join>>
Choice: state choice_state <<choice>>
Notes: note right of s1 : text ... end note
Concurrency: state name { s1 --> s2 -- s3 --> s4 }
Direction: direction LR

ER Diagram.syntax:
Start with: erDiagram
Entities: ENTITY_NAME { type name PK\n type name FK }
Relationships: A ||--o{ B : label
Cardinality markers: || (exactly one) o| (zero or one) }| (one or more) }o (zero or more)
Types: string, int, float, date, boolean, enum
Keys: PK (primary) FK (foreign) UK (unique)
IMPORTANT: Entity names must be single words (no spaces). Relationship labels are required.

Gantt.syntax:
Start with: gantt
title: title My Title
dateFormat: dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
axisFormat: axisFormat %m/%d
Sections: section Name
Tasks: TaskName :id, start, duration or TaskName :id, after otherId, duration
Duration: 1d 2w 3h
Status: done, active, crit (critical)
Milestone: TaskName :milestone, id, after otherId, 0d
Excludes: excludes weekends / excludes 2024-01-01

Pie Chart.syntax:
Start with: pie
Optional title: pie title My Title
Optional showData to display values
Data entries: "Label" : value
Values are numbers (int or float)
Example:
pie title Pets
    "Dogs" : 386
    "Cats" : 85
    "Rats" : 15

Mindmap.syntax:
Start with: mindmap
Root: root((text)) for circle, root(text) for rounded, root[text] for square, root)text( for bang, root{{text}} for hexagon
Children defined by INDENTATION (2 spaces per level)
Node shapes: id((circle)) id(rounded) id[square] id)bang( id{{hexagon}} id)cloud(
Icons: ::icon(fa fa-icon)
Classes: :::className
IMPORTANT: Indentation defines hierarchy. No arrows or links — only nesting.

Timeline.syntax:
Start with: timeline
Optional: title My Title
Time periods: 2024-Q1 : Event 1 : Event 2
Events on new lines with same indentation share the time period
Sections: section Name
Example:
timeline
    title History
    2020 : Event A
         : Event B
    2021 : Event C

Git Graph.syntax:
Start with: gitGraph
Commit: commit (on current branch)
Commit with id: commit id: "abc"
Commit with tag: commit tag: "v1.0"
Commit type: commit type: HIGHLIGHT / REVERSE / NORMAL
Branch: branch name
Checkout: checkout name
Merge: merge name
Cherry-pick: cherry-pick id: "abc"
Order: order: 0 (branch display order)
Orientation: TB or LR (via options)
